summary: P0 Recovery testing: All 9 backend tests PASSED. HR modules visible and working. AI rates use org settings (source=organization). Settings area shows EUR. AIPricingBreakdown shows EUR for hourly rates. However, NovoSMRPage totals still display in 'лв' (BGN) instead of EUR.

integration_issues.issue: Totals and price labels show 'лв' (BGN) instead of EUR. Lines 330, 348, 371, 375, 408 in NovoSMRPage.js need to change from 'лв' to 'EUR'

issues: React hydration warning: nested div inside p element (cosmetic only)

action_items: Change NovoSMRPage.js lines 330, 348, 371, 375, 408 from 'лв' to 'EUR' to match AIPricingBreakdown component
critical_code_review_comments: AIPricingBreakdown.js correctly shows EUR/ч for hourly rates (line 29)
extra_works.py correctly uses DEMO_WORKER_RATES as fallback, org rates from db.settings when configured
hourly_info in AI response correctly includes currency='EUR' and is_demo=false when org rates configured
CompanySettingsPage loads rates from /ai-config/hourly-rates and shows 'Конфигурирани' badge when saved

success_rate.frontend: 90% - EUR display issue in NovoSMRPage totals

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Recovery tested. Backend: All AI endpoints return hourly_info with currency='EUR', is_demo=false when org rates configured. HR endpoints (/employees, /payroll-runs, /advances) all working. Frontend: Worker rates section shows EUR and 'Конфигурирани' badge. AIPricingBreakdown shows EUR. Issue: NovoSMRPage totals still use 'лв' currency symbol.

Backend: GET /api/ai-config/hourly-rates.notes: Returns source='organization' when org rates configured, currency='EUR'

Backend: PUT /api/ai-config/hourly-rates.notes: Saves to db.settings, returns ok=True and source='organization'

Backend: GET /api/employees returns empl.notes: Returns list of employees with profile data

Backend: GET /api/historical/analytics r.notes: Returns 461 rows, 60 categories - historical data intact

Frontend: Settings page has worker rates.notes: Shows 'Ценообразуване / Часови ставки' with EUR labels and 'Конфигурирани' badge

Frontend: Sidebar shows HR links.notes: Служители, Аванси, Заплати, Присъствие, Преглед отчети all visible

Frontend: Employees page loads.notes: Shows employee list with pay types and EUR rates

Frontend: Novo SMR AI shows EUR in prici.notes: AIPricingBreakdown shows EUR/ч for hourly rates, BUT NovoSMRPage totals still show 'лв' (lines 330, 348, 371, 375, 408)

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
